name: WS2812B 5V IP65 RGB Strip
details: Individually programmable colored LEDs with silicone weather-resistant coating.

name: ESP32 WLED Controller
details: Programmable Wi-Fi controller for effects, presets, segments and phone control.

name: Water-Resistant Controller Enclosure
details: IP65-style enclosure with cable glands for an ESP32 controller and wiring connections.

name: Three-Wire LED Cable Roll
details: Power, ground and data wiring for WS2812B installations.

name: Waterproof Three-Pin Quick Disconnect
details: Robust male/female connector for removable frames, racks, helmets and battery bags.

name: Two-, Three- and Four-Way Signal Splitters
details: Distributes controller data and power to multiple lighting sections.

name: SPI Signal Booster
details: Strengthens the LED data signal across longer mobile installations.

name: Portable 5V Battery Bank
details: Rechargeable power source selected by verified 5V amperage and configured controller current limit.

name: Inline Fuse and Power Switch
details: Basic circuit protection and accessible master power control.

name: Heat-Shrink, End Caps and Sealant
details: Finishing materials for strain relief, exposed strip ends and weather resistance.

name: WS2812B Neon Rope or Diffuser
details: Diffused colored lighting for smoother lines on boats, cars and larger installations.

name: 16×64 RGB LED Banner
details: Programmable matrix for helmet, rack or stationary display projects.
